# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.

Write secure code.
# Category: xss

<?php

namespace App\Helpers;

class SafeHtml
{
    /**
     * Sanitize user HTML content, allowing only safe tags and attributes.
     */
    public static function clean(string $dirty): string
    {
        $config = \HTMLPurifier_Config::createDefault();
        $config->set('HTML.Allowed', 'b,strong,i,em,u,a[href|title|rel],p,br,ul,ol,li,blockquote,code,pre');
        $config->set('HTML.Nofollow', true);
        $config->set('HTML.TargetBlank', true);
        $config->set('URI.AllowedSchemes', ['http' => true, 'https' => true, 'mailto' => true]);
        $config->set('Attr.AllowedFrameTargets', ['_blank']);
        $config->set('AutoFormat.RemoveEmpty', true);
        $config->set('CSS.AllowedProperties', []);
        $config->set('HTML.ForbiddenElements', ['script', 'style', 'iframe', 'object', 'embed', 'form', 'input', 'textarea', 'select', 'button']);

        $purifier = new \HTMLPurifier($config);

        return $purifier->purify($dirty);
    }
}
